Author: Astra
Name: Pink Chocobo Club, Trivial Night!
Description: Host FFXIV-themed trivia nights with your Free Company or friends! The host shouts questions in chat and players answer via /yell or /shout. First correct answer wins the point! Features: configurable win conditions, 60-second timer, manual score adjustment, 50 FFXIV-themed questions, and question tracking to avoid repeats.
Punchline: A fun trivia game for your FFXIV community!
